xk¡o ds fudV [Qk-la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@619@11&12@lhvks@thlh@QjDdk&jk;xat¼295&398½chvksVh] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th November, 2016 S.O. 3452(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road, Transport and Highways bearing S.O. No. 946(E), dated 30th April 2012, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely:- [NHAI/13013/619/11-12/CO/GC Farakka-Raiganj (295-398)BOT] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt.
